'''dadoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibong|nibong]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibong|nibong]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dadoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dædeketh|dædeketh]] || [[word:dædekej|dædekej]] || [[word:dædekesh|dædekesh]] || [[word:dædeke|dædeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadodokoth|dadodokoth]] || [[word:dadodokoj|dadodokoj]] || [[word:dadodokosh|dadodokosh]] || [[word:dadodoko|dadodoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadokoth|dadokoth]] || [[word:dadokoj|dadokoj]] || [[word:dadokosh|dadokosh]] || [[word:dadoko|dadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadofkoth|dadofkoth]] || [[word:dadofkoj|dadofkoj]] || [[word:dadofkosh|dadofkosh]] || [[word:dadofkof|dadofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dadokotho|dadokotho]] || [[word:dadokojo|dadokojo]] || [[word:dadokosho|dadokosho]] || [[word:dadokoko|dadokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dadokoth|dadokoth]] || [[word:dadokoj|dadokoj]] || [[word:dadokosh|dadokosh]] || [[word:dadoko|dadoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dadokothol|dadokothol]] || [[word:dadokojol|dadokojol]] || [[word:dadokoshol|dadokoshol]] || [[word:dadokokol|dadokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dadokothotho|dadokothotho]] || [[word:dadokojojo|dadokojojo]] || [[word:dadokoshosho|dadokoshosho]] || [[word:dadokoko|dadokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dadokothon|dadokothon]] || [[word:dadokojon|dadokojon]] || [[word:dadokoshon|dadokoshon]] || [[word:dadokokon|dadokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dadokothoro|dadokothoro]] || [[word:dadokojoro|dadokojoro]] || [[word:dadokoshoro|dadokoshoro]] || [[word:dadokokoro|dadokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
